title: PackagedExExExCrafting
description: Even More Extended Crafting Autocrafting with PackagedAuto
body:
PackagedExExExCrafting is an addon to PackagedAuto, PackagedExCrafting, and Extended Crafting: Expanded Reforked, and it adds the ability to automatically craft items made using the Legendary Crafting Table more easily. This mod is designed to be able to run without Applied Energistics 2, but installation with it is recommended.

This mod adds the Legendary Package Crafter. To use it, put one next to an Unpackager, and have the Unpackager handle Legendary Crafting recipes, which can be encoded into recipe holders with the Encoder. The crafter, when connected to a ME Network, will automatically eject outputs into the network.
